"use strict";
/**
 * TimerSystem — 计时器系统核心
 *
 * 职责：管理所有计时器条目的生命周期（添加、更新、移除）。
 * 策略分发、句柄创建等职责已拆分至独立文件，本文件只关注调度逻辑。
 */
Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
exports.TimerSystem = void 0;
const TimerTypes_1 = require("./TimerTypes");
const TickStrategy_1 = require("./TickStrategy");
const TimerHandle_1 = require("./TimerHandle");
class TimerSystem {
    moduleName = "TimerSystem";
    _timers = new Map();
    /** tick 过程中标记待删除的 ID，tick 结束后统一清除（Mark-Sweep） */
    _pendingRemove = [];
    /** tick 开始时快照当前所有 ID，防止同帧新增的计时器被立即 tick */
    _tickIds = [];
    _nextId = 1;
    _activeCount = 0;
    _ticking = false;
    // ── IModule 生命周期 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    onInit(_fw) { }
    onUpdate(deltaTime) {
        this._ticking = true;
        // 先快照 ID 列表，防止回调中新增的计时器在同一帧被 tick
        for (const id of this._timers.keys())
            this._tickIds.push(id);
        for (const id of this._tickIds) {
            const entry = this._timers.get(id);
            if (!entry || entry.paused || entry.pendingRemove)
                continue;
            const strategy = (0, TickStrategy_1.getStrategy)(entry.type);
            if (!strategy.tick(entry, deltaTime))
                continue;
            this._fire(entry, strategy);
        }
        this._tickIds.length = 0;
        this._ticking = false;
        this._sweep();
    }
    onShutdown() {
        this.clearAll();
    }
    // ── ITimerSystem 公开 API ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    addFrameTimer(interval, callback, repeat = 1) {
        return this._add(TimerTypes_1.TimerType.Frame, Math.max(1, Math.floor(interval)), callback, repeat);
    }
    addSecondTimer(interval, callback, repeat = 1) {
        return this._add(TimerTypes_1.TimerType.Second, Math.max(0.001, interval), callback, repeat);
    }
    addMinuteTimer(interval, callback, repeat = 1) {
        return this._add(TimerTypes_1.TimerType.Minute, Math.max(0.001, interval) * 60, callback, repeat);
    }
    removeTimer(id) {
        const entry = this._timers.get(id);
        if (!entry || entry.pendingRemove)
            return false;
        this._markRemove(entry);
        if (!this._ticking)
            this._sweep();
        return true;
    }
    pauseTimer(id) {
        const entry = this._timers.get(id);
        if (entry && !entry.pendingRemove)
            entry.paused = true;
    }
    resumeTimer(id) {
        const entry = this._timers.get(id);
        if (entry && !entry.pendingRemove)
            entry.paused = false;
    }
    resetTimer(id) {
        const entry = this._timers.get(id);
        if (entry && !entry.pendingRemove)
            entry.elapsed = 0;
    }
    clearAll() {
        this._timers.clear();
        this._pendingRemove.length = 0;
        this._activeCount = 0;
    }
    get activeCount() {
        return this._activeCount;
    }
    // ── ITimerController（供 TimerHandle 回调）────────────────────────────────
    isTimerActive(id) {
        const entry = this._timers.get(id);
        return entry != null && !entry.pendingRemove;
    }
    isTimerPaused(id) {
        return this._timers.get(id)?.paused ?? false;
    }
    // ── 私有辅助 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    _add(type, interval, callback, repeat) {
        const id = this._nextId++;
        const entry = {
            id, type, interval,
            elapsed: 0,
            remaining: repeat <= 0 ? -1 : repeat,
            callback,
            paused: false,
            pendingRemove: false,
        };
        this._timers.set(id, entry);
        this._activeCount++;
        return new TimerHandle_1.TimerHandle(this, id);
    }
    _fire(entry, strategy) {
        try {
            entry.callback();
        }
        catch (err) {
            console.error(`[TimerSystem] Uncaught error in timer #${entry.id}:`, err);
        }
        // 回调可能调用 cancel()（pendingRemove=true）或 clearAll()（entry 已从 map 中移除），
        // 两者都意味着本计时器不应继续处理生命周期逻辑
        if (entry.pendingRemove || !this._timers.has(entry.id))
            return;
        if (entry.remaining === -1) {
            strategy.afterFire(entry);
        }
        else {
            entry.remaining--;
            if (entry.remaining <= 0) {
                this._markRemove(entry);
            }
            else {
                strategy.afterFire(entry);
            }
        }
    }
    _markRemove(entry) {
        if (entry.pendingRemove)
            return;
        entry.pendingRemove = true;
        this._pendingRemove.push(entry.id);
        this._activeCount--;
    }
    _sweep() {
        for (const id of this._pendingRemove) {
            this._timers.delete(id);
        }
        this._pendingRemove.length = 0;
    }
}
exports.TimerSystem = TimerSystem;
//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
